title: Advanced Medieval
description: make your world in to a medieval style with this mod
body:
welcome to 
![the Advanced Medieval Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a9c1acb58b8e5bfd12c4801e52bb78a1b1d9d73.png)
this mod will turn your minecraft world in to a medieval style in a unique way 

Step into a medieval fantasy world filled with new adventures, strange creatures, powerful relics, and forgotten ruins. This mod brings fresh progression and exploration to Minecraft without breaking the vanilla feel, adding new biomes, mobs, ores, weapons, structures, and even a mysterious dimension. Explore the towering crimson trees of the Redwood Forest, wander the eerie Phantom Plains, survive the cursed Decaying Forest, or uncover glowing secrets within the Amber Hollow. Along the way you’ll encounter unique creatures like the ghostly Wisp, the swamp-dwelling Crocodillo, the lightning-charged Bolt, the magical Bloom, the icy Brumal, and the haunted Brume.

Mine three powerful new ores—Solarite, Soulflare, and Echorite—and fuse them into rare ingots to craft weapons unlike anything else in Minecraft. Wield the fiery Soulflare Blade, the returning Soul Boomerang, the chilling Ice Scythe, the deadly Poison Dagger, the mighty Void Battle Axe, or even lightning-charged blades and classic medieval sidearms. Unlock elemental magic through scrolls tied to powerful mobs, with Fire, Lightning, Earth, Phantom, Air, and Ice scrolls letting you harness mystical forces in combat.

Ancient structures lie scattered across the world: the towering Phantom Tower, mysterious Stone Totem ruins, and frozen Ice Castles filled with loot and danger. Deep exploration may even lead you to the Phantom Dimension, a new realm haunted by strange mobs and powerful treasures. Along the way you’ll discover secrets both practical and fun, like Stealth Armor for sneaky players, the decorative Knight Statue, the mysterious Stone Totem that pulses with power, and even more splash texts to keep things lighthearted.

With every step you’ll find something new to uncover, from medieval weapons and armor to mystical scrolls and dangerous dungeons. Whether you’re exploring strange biomes, delving into ruins, battling new monsters, or crafting legendary gear, this mod keeps your Minecraft world alive with progression, mystery, and medieval adventure.



The mod requires Pehkui
plans: a new boss, dungions, more magic, more biomes, more hostile and friendly tamable mobs. 

(i might make a website where you can find out about everything in this mod)
